title: lagenophora bellioides
intro: Lagenophora bellioides, also known as Bell's daisy or Bell's everlasting, is a plant species in the daisy family that grows in the wild in southern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Lagenophora bellioides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
